items.previewTitle:
CALLING ALL QUEER READERS & CREW
Want to be a part of the creative process for our feature; ‘The Suit I Buried Her In’? 

Synopsis: After the sudden death of his lover, Oliver is left to grieve alone— haunted by memories, a dysfunctional family, and a truth he never got to fully share. As he navigates his identity and the people closest to him, one question remains: Did his partner really know him at all? Did anyone really?

For questions or inquiries, DM us or send us an email at the8tharchiveprod@gmail.com

(This is a funded project and we would love for you to join us in making this film come to life!)

Follow us for more updates!

#the8tharchive #vancouverfilm #tsibhi #screenplay #crewcall

We are still looking to cast our main love interest- Freddie! (Manchester based)

“Pufferfish” tells the story of a young woman with Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) navigating the dating world. She goes on several dates until she finally meets Freddie; who she thinks is the one.

This is an unpaid project but travel and catering will be provided! Shooting will be in Mid - April.

If you are interested please reach out via DM on our instagram @pufferfish.short or email us at pufferfish.short@gmail.com 

We can’t wait to hear from you! ˚₊✩‧₊

items.text:
Casting a short student film following 24 year old Mikey who becomes consumed by the growing anxiety that he is running out of time. While everyone around him seem to be moving ahead in life. After receiving a watch he believes is bad luck, it's constant ticking reflects his fear and turns his routines into a race he cant escape.

Through the contrast of his carefree best friend. Skylar he begins to question the pressure he puts on himself. When the watch stops, he realises his fear of falling behind was more limiting that time itself.

This is a visually driven, deeply relatable short film exploring the "quarter-life crisis," the weight of modern expectations, and learning how to finally breathe. We are looking for talented, passionate actors to bring this psychological and emotional journey to life.

Please note: As this is a student production, it is an unpaid role. However, it is a fantastic opportunity to collaborate with an ambitious crew in Liverpool

IF YOU HAVE ANY QUESTIONS PLEASE MESSAGE ME OR IF YOU WANT MORE INFORMATION ABOUT THE PROJECT PLEASE CHECK OUR MANDY POST 

https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3114924/catching-time/

items.text:
LOS ANGELES… this is the very FIRST show.

The cherry-poppin’ kickoff of my brand new comedy tour and reality television series.

Yes… we are actually filming the show.

So if you’ve ever wanted to accidentally end up on television while laughing at a pastor, a porn star, and a lineup of chaotic comedians… this is your moment.

Only 28 seats.
This is an intimate VIP comedy night.

Doors open at 7PM so come early, take pictures with me and the comedians, grab autographs, say hi, and get comfortable before we start filming.

Show starts at 7:30PM.

Also show love to the venue by ordering food or drinks (two-item minimum). Keep the drinks flowing so the laughs keep coming.

If this show sells out — and it probably will — you’ll miss the very first night of the tour.

And nobody wants to be the person saying:
“I heard the first show was legendary.”

Come be part of the chaos.

🎟 Tickets: C3TIX.COM
📍 The Living Room DTLA @thelivingroomdtla

#christylove #standupcomedy #losangelescomedy #comedyshow #comedynight

items.text:
**Title:** Exit Wound 

**Genre:** Drama

**Logline:** A young man chooses between love and opportunity as he breaks news that could have devastating implications to his relationship over an anniversary dinner.

**Role: **RICK (30's-50's) Rick is confident, charismatic, and commanding but the charm masks deep insecurity. He clings to control as the only way he knows how to keep someone close. He fears abandonment but fears being truly seen even more.

**Director/Writer:** Gatlin Zbylski 

**Assistant Director: **Jack Brown

**Production Type:** Student Film

**Contact Information:** Please send all submissions to gatlinjack777@gmail.com. Either Director or Assistant Director will follow up with you.

**Run Time:** Short. 7-11 Minutes.

**Compensation: **Unpaid. Meal and Reel provided!

**Union Status: **Non-stop

**Audition Information:** Please send Headshot, Resume, and attached self-tape audition sides to gatlinjack777@gmail.com no later than ***Friday, 03/13/26 by 8PM. ***Reels accepted but not required.

**Shooting Schedule:** March 20th, night shoot. March 21st, day shoot begins in afternoon. Exact times TBD.

**Filming Location: **11553 Pink Phlox Drive Parker, Colorado 80134.

**Project Description: **Light intimacy (kissing) and combat (thrown dinner plate at other character) required for role. Any combat or matters of intimacy will be detailed in the Intimacy Consent Form, discussed in depth, and rehearsed to Actor's comfort level.

items.text:
✨ Client Spotlight | The Power of Voice in Animation & Games ✨
There is something truly otherworldly about Corbett Barklie’s voice — an ethereal quality that carries emotion, story, and soul. A voice shaped by a life deeply lived in the arts, and one that feels perfectly at home in the worlds of animation, games, and immersive storytelling.

Corbett isn’t just a brilliant voice artist and actor — she is a storyteller whose performances are informed by decades of creative leadership, collaboration, and human connection. In animation and gaming, where truth, imagination, and emotional depth matter most, lived experience is everything — and Corbett brings it in abundance.

With an extensive career across the arts in the USA and Northern Ireland, Corbett blends warmth, intelligence, and quiet power with absolute professionalism on mic. She connects instinctively with audiences, delivering performances that feel grounded, expansive, and unmistakably real.

Her influence behind the scenes is just as impressive:

Founder and Director of Loretta Theatre, Executive Director of ARTS Inc., Deputy Director of Development at Center Theatre Group, consultant and assessor for the NEA, Adjunct Professor at USC School of Theatre, and a champion of bold, unexpected collaborations through her work as a producer and arts consultant.

This is proof that it’s never too late to pivot, never too late to step into a new, vital skillset — and never too late to find your voice in animation, games, and beyond.

🎙️ Ready to elevate your voiceover work?

Book one-to-one coaching with us at pblvoiceover.com, DM us, or get in touch via the website.

Recalibrate. Refocus. Unlock your full creative Voiceover power.

items.summary:
✨ Client Spotlight | The Power of Voice in Animation & Games ✨
There is something truly otherworldly about Corbett Barklie’s voice — an ethereal quality that carries emotion, story, and soul. A voice shaped by a life deeply lived in the arts, and one that feels perfectly at home in the worlds of animation, games, and immersive storytelling.

Corbett isn’t just a brilliant voice artist and actor — she is a storyteller whose performances are informed by decades of creative leadership, collaboration, and human connection. In animation and gaming, where truth, imagination, and emotional depth matter most, lived experience is everything — and Corbett brings it in abundance.

With an extensive career across the arts in the USA and Northern Ireland, Corbett blends warmth, intelligence, and quiet power with absolute professionalism on mic. She connects instinctively with audiences, delivering performances that feel grounded, expansive, and unmistakably real.

Her influence behind the scenes is just as impressive:

Founder and Director of Loretta Theatre, Executive Director of ARTS Inc., Deputy Director of Development at Center Theatre Group, consultant and assessor for the NEA, Adjunct Professor at USC School of Theatre, and a champion of bold, unexpected collaborations through her work as a producer and arts consultant.

This is proof that it’s never too late to pivot, never too late to step into a new, vital skillset — and never too late to find your voice in animation, games, and beyond.

🎙️ Ready to elevate your voiceover work?

Book one-to-one coaching with us at pblvoiceover.com, DM us, or get in touch via the website.

Recalibrate. Refocus. Unlock your full creative Voiceover power.
items.title: ✨ Client Spotlight | The Power of Voice in Animation & Games ✨

items.text:
Audition Notice
“Scrooge! (Abbreviated Version)” 

Book, Music and Lyrics by Leslie Bricusse

From A Christmas Carol by Charles Dickens

A one-hour adaptation of the crowd-pleasing holiday musical!

In 1970, renowned writer/composer/lyricist Leslie Bricusse adapted the classic Charles Dickens tale A Christmas Carol into the hit screen musical Scrooge! 

A charming stage musical, Scrooge! 

Lyons Community Theatre

Auditions: Will be held at Planet Bluegrass Lab Building(Directions), on Friday, Oct 3rd, 5-7pm; Sunday, Oct 5th,  1-3pm and Monday, Oct 6th, 5-7pm  (If none of these days or times work for you, please contact georgi.pollard@gmail.com by Sunday, Oct 5th @12pm

Performance dates:

Friday, December 12th, 2025 @7pm 

Saturday, December 13th, 2025 @2pm & 7pm

Sunday, December 14th, 2025 @2pm 

@Planet Bluegrass Wildflower Pavillion 

All auditioners  will be asked to sing 16 measures from the musical or a verse from a familiar holiday song.

We will dance a few moves and those wanting a speaking role will read from the script. Everyone is encouraged to show off your English accent!  Although not necessary, you are welcome to bring a prepared song to share.  We will have an accompanist.

Roles are Non-Union | Unpaid

LCT encourages actors of all races, ethnicities, genders, ages, and abilities all ages to audition, welcoming performers from all backgrounds.

Performers may come on any one of the days or you may sign up using the Signup Genius link

Link to Sign up for an Audition Slot:

SIGN UP LINK

https://www.signupgenius.com/go/70A0A4BA4A723ABFE3-58313489-scrooge#/

items.previewDescription: In 2042, in a secret laboratory near Warsaw, an international team of scientists developed the VIRIDIAN serum an experimental bio mRNA agent designed to neutralize aggression in the human brain and thus prevent the outbreak of World War III. However, something went wrong. The virus mutated. Instead....

CASTING CALL! New LIFE OF CHRIST show with The Lantern Marquee, Performing May 25-30! Auditions (video submission) due Thurs 3/12, callbacks 3/14.
Why you want to be part of it:

🪨Performing as a themed dinner theatre at Provo's historic castle amphitheater, covered in lanterns!

🪨Music ONLY, no dialogue! Rehearsal schedule workable around your life. (required on-site dates: May 18-22; 25-30, evenings)

🪨Beautiful covers of 80's songs that have been carefully curated according to their spiritual analogues. (eg. "Who Wants to Live Forever," (cover by Il Volo) originally sung by Queen, is sung by Christ and the Disciples in our show. It’s amazing check it out:

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=RwKUxTMSs6M)

DM with questions!

Learn more and audition using this link:

https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1IhT-JZE7AEzRCOAyqVS8P0PN6daj9G_z?usp=sharing

items.text:
WARSAW - THIS SUNDAY

👻 GHOSTED
A stand-up comedy show by Bianca Lala

Ever sent a “hey 🙂”…
and received complete spiritual silence?

Ghosted is a fast, sharp and painfully funny comedy show about modern dating unread messages, emotional typing bubbles, situationships, and the mysterious art of disappearing.

Bianca Lala dives into dating disasters, cultural misunderstandings, soft heartbreaks and very hard screenshots with jokes that land exactly where your last situationship still lives.

Come laugh at the awkwardness.
Come heal a little.
Come realise it wasn’t just you.

(It was definitely also them.)

🗓 This Sunday  March 15
⏰ 6:00 PM
📍 Południk 2.0, Warsaw

Perfect for:
• single people
• complicated people
• happily taken people who still enjoy the stories

If you’ve ever been ghosted…
this show finally texts you back.

🎟 Tickets
https://fienta.com/pl/ghosted-with-bianca-lala

✨ Bonus event the same day

At 4:00 PM, Bianca is also hosting an intimate workshop for artists:

Branding as an Artist - Find Your Voice, Shape Your Style

Perfect for comedians, performers, and creatives who want to stand out without sounding like a corporate brand.

🎟 Workshop tickets
https://fienta.com/pl/branding-as-an-artist-169889

items.text:
Agencja STARS poszukuje osób do krótkiej sesji zdjęciowej w klimacie City Break!

TYLKO OSOBY, KTÓRE JESZCZE NIE BRAŁY UDZIAŁU

 Termin: **13.03**

 Lokalizacja: **Warszawa – Śródmieście**

 Dyspozycyjność: 1h sesja wykonywana w pierwszej połowie dnia- dokładne godziny dostaną osoby wybrane.

(Zdjęcia trwają 30 minut – dokładna godzina zostanie podana po zgłoszeniu dyspozycyjności w podanym dniu).

** O projekcie:**

Sesja realizowana jest na użytek wewnętrzny klienta (bez publikacji) – w ramach projektu technologicznego mającego na celu odróżnianie zdjęć profesjonalnych od amatorskich.

 Stawka: **100 zł netto**

Płatność po podpisaniu umowy na planie oraz wykonaniu zdjęć!

 Ubiór:

Schludne, nowoczesne stylizacje, kolorowe, jak zdjęcia na insta.

 Bez bieli, czerni oraz czapek zasłaniających twarz.

 Zgłoszenia:

Wyślij email na: **o.peczak@stars-impresariat.pl** podając imię nazwisko, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie.

Możesz zgłaszać również znajomych i rodzinę, paczkę , z którą lubisz się bawić 

Do zobaczenia na planie!

Możesz zgłaszać również znajomych i rodzinę, paczkę , z którą lubisz się bawić 

Do zobaczenia na planie!

topComments.text:
Genre : comedy, drama 

Based in : UK 

Recorded in : the Wirral 
Filming locations : Wirral 
Filming date : April/may - ongoing 

Premise : an unlikely group of friends from a multitude of backgrounds including highschool drop outs, educated college students, and even a low time drug dealer. Set between 2000s and 2015, this series shows friendship is messy and chaotic, pulling no punches, this group is unpredictable and at times emotional, but always "real". 

Tone : nostalgic, friendly, comedic, 

Characters : 

.Izzy pastel - smart student with a down to earth personality, attends college, always having banter with the lads and able to keep up, mental sparring is her Forte. [ Free ] 

.Jamie "ash" carter - rough around the edges but lovable, college drop out ( kick out), enjoys art, joking, and smoking. 
[ Taken ] 

.Ryan carter - older brother to Jamie. Shy, calm, and reserved, doesn't talk much but when he does it's comedy gold. 
[ Free ] 

.Eddie sharp - close friends with the carter brothers, they all went to school together, consistently unemployed, low time drug dealer. 
[ Taken ] 

.Callum nightly - loves being the centre of attention, close friendship with Eddie due to consist drug use. Can sometimes be erratic. 
[ Free ] 

. Sophie frost - blonde, chaotic, extreme drug user, loves raves festivals and flirting, the group help her slow down from her fast paced lifestyle. 
[ Free ] 

.Ethan shroud - althletic rugby player, trains week days, parties weekends, knows his limits and dosnt take things too far, slightly better off than the rest of the group but always shares the wealth. 
[ Free ] 

Simon Skinner "psycho si" - local bully, always taking stuff from the group, hates everyone, hated by everyone. Loose cannon, can switch mood in an instance.
[ Free ] 

EXTRAS : 
all extra positions available 

Production crew : 
Director
Sound engineer
Editer 

Pay and travel : possible compensation | travel covered | 

Credits : full credits with legal or chosen name 

Character wardrobes : 

.Jamie "ash" carter - button up shirts, patterns, jeans, denim jackets, caps,

.Ryan carter - hoodies, joggers, jeans, 

.Izzy pastel - jumpers, skirts, jeans, hoodies, 

.Eddie sharp - tracksuits, beanies, trainers, 

.Ethan shroud - jumpers, sports jerseys, jeans, boots,

.Callum nightly - windbreakers, tracksuits, hoodies, joggers, jeans, 

.Evie Owens - shirts, jeans, leopard prints 

.Simon Skinner "psycho Simon" - tracksuits, hoodies, joggers, caps, Burberry 

NOTE : MUST BE COMFORTABLE SMOKING EFFECT CIGARETTES
Hi

items.title: new castingcall

sharedPost.text:
Pedofil poza FB i czujna mama.
Pedofil prowadzi casting do „Kroniki Szmaragdowego Lustra”.

Z tym panem z pewnością mieliśmy już styczność. Jeśli się nie mylę, to był obecny na mycasting.pl, ale tam już dawno taka „legenda” nie przejdzie. Dla niego stało się zbyt bezpiecznie dla małoletnich. Teraz działa na ACMODASI.PL.

W prawdzie nadal jestem na etapie ustalania pewnych informacji, które oczywiście przedstawię Wam później, aczkolwiek wymagane jest chociażby ostrzeżenie skoro już coś wiem. Takowe teraz zamieszczam.

Konto, o którym mowa jest pod linkiem https://www.acmodasi.pl/a_510642.html. Znajdują się tam pewne informacje, ale zdecydowanie niewystarczające jak na osobę, która prowadzi casting. Jest tam zdjęcie, które oczywiście nic nie mówi, jest też wiek, a sam adres e-mail do kontaktu można poznać dopiero w odpowiedzi na zgłoszenie. Adresem tym jest kaletaa024@gmail.com. W części opisowej tegoż profilu na acmodasi.pl jest też coś ciekawego, bo w tabelce opisowej „Dokumenty zweryfikowane” wyraźnie widać „NIE”, co jest znaczące.

Sam casting natomiast jest jeszcze możliwy do odnalezienia pod linkiem https://www.acmodasi.pl/castings/in_tv_series/c_85000_role-w-filmie-kroniki-szmaragdowego-lustra.html. Robiony jest pod projekt serialu o tytule „Kroniki Szmaragdowego Lustra”, w którym grają chyba same dzieci obojga płci. Panna Kaleta w rozmowach prowadzonych podczas castingu nie informuje w ogóle, z jakiej jest agencji i nie prowadzi rozmowy innej niż poprzez w/w adres e-mail. W samej za to rozmowie pojawia się dość nietypowa prośba, której zasadniczo nie powinno być, bo tyczy się zdjęć małoletniej w bieliźnie. Otóż Drodzy Państwo, takie pytanie nie pojawi się nigdy w rozmowie z realną agencją.

Podsumowując, to na ten moment tylko tyle przedstawiam. Tak, czy inaczej to ważne jest to, aby nie wysyłać zdjęć dzieci osobom w ogóle nie zweryfikowanym. Epizod, o którym opowiem niedługo, na szczęście i tak pochodził od rozmowy z mamą małoletniej. Ona sama spotkała się z moim postem na grupie i dlatego nie zarzuciła kontakt.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says '16:05 55 ACMODASI Castingi Kraj, miasto Warunki płatności Poland, Warsaw $ Opłata Wymagania ogólne tantiemy 5-25 lat, M/K Status Open Casting otwarty Udział f Opis projektu Rodzaj produkcji: Serial fantasy przygodowy Stanowisko: Różne role dziecięce, młodzieżowe młodych dorosłych OPIS PROJEKTU: Zapraszamy młodych, utalentowanycl aktorów aktorki w wieku 5-25 lat do udziału w kastingu do nowego, ekscytującego serialu fantasy "Kroniki Szmaragdowego Lustra". Serial opowiada epicką historię grupy dzieci, które odkrywają magiczny portal muszą stawić czoła mrocznym siłom, by ocalić dwa splatające się światy. Poszukujemy charyzmatycznych, naturalnychi ekspresyjnych osób, które chciałyby dołączyć do tej niezwykłej przygody.'
May be an image of text

May be an image of text that says '16:05 55 5 ACMODASI Castingi WYMAGANIA: Wiek w dniu kastingu: 5-25 lat. Doświadczenie aktorskie (teatr, reklama, film) będzie dodatkowym atutem, ale wymagane. Szczególnie mile widziane są osoby bez doświadczenia! nie jest Umiejętność naturalnej gry przed kamerą. Gotowość do pracy na planie zdjęciowym w określonych terminach. Opieka prawnego opiekuna dla osób niepełnoletnich. OFERUJEMY: Pracę na planie wysokobudżetowej produkcji. Profesjonalne warunki pracy. Niezapomniane doświadczenie aktorski. rozwój Warunki płatności Wysokie honorarium ustalane indywidualnie.'

May be an image of text that says '16:05 55 ACMODASI Castingi Warunki płatności Wysokie honorarium ustalane indywidualnie. Nie masz zdjęć w swoim profilu lub nie masz zainstalowanego zdjęcia tytułowego. Aby przystąpić do castingu należy w formularzu zgłoszeniowym dodać minimum 1 zdjęcie. Dodaj zdjęcie Typy Do roli Zosia Potrzebne są Kobieta wiekiem z 8 do 10 lat Opis Aplikacja! Ciekawska, odważna o czułym sercu przywódczyni grupy. Do roli Amelka Potrzebne są Kobieta wiekiem z do 12'

May be an image of text that says '10:25 68 acmodasi.pl/casti + 24 ACMODASI Castingi Ulepsz swój profil- zyskaj wyjątkową promocję Role w filmie "Kroniki Szmaragdowego Lustra" Castingi Castingi do serialu Castingi do serialu w mieście Warsaw Casting prowadzi Anna Kaleta Ocena pracodawcy 27/100 Rodzaj ogłoszenia Casting, ID: 85000 Rodzaj projektu Castingi do serialu Terminy castingów do 14 Marca 2026 Kraj, miasto Warunki płatności Poland, Warsaw $ Opłata Wymagania ogólne tantiemy 5-25 lat, M/K Status Open Casting otwarty'

items.title: Casting Warszawa

items.text:
Casting Warszawa
Szukam do kilku ról!

Osoba przy Gibańcu 23-45 lat

Mężczyzna w typie nerda z potencjałem komediowym. Może być lekko przy kości, albo być np wysoki i chudy. Musi mieć poczucie rytmu i jakieś umiejętności taneczne. (referencja: młody Seth Rogen) 

2. Kobieta w ogrodzie 30-40 lat

Aktywna promienista kobieta o przyjaznej energii. Naturalna! Chętnie o dłuższych blond włosach, chętnie z piegami lub diastemą, ale nie jest to konieczność. 

 Szukam 3 osób - znajomych charakterystyczni ludzie, pozytywni, styl gen-z, ale bez zbyt dużej ilości tatuaży i piercingu, mają być różni od siebie stylem i kolorem włosów, poniżej wypisuje przykładową ekipę, która może posłużyć jako referencja, ale nie jest to konieczność: 

- chłopak z kręconymi włosami, chętnie typ śmieszka z jakimiś może niedoskonałościami (Referencja: Dustin ze Stranger Things)

-chłopak wysoki, może bardziej badboy, kontrastowy do kolegi wyżej (referencja: raper Szczyl) 

-girl next door z urokiem osobistym, pewnie obaj się w niej kochają (chętnie w typie Margaret Qualley lub młodej Emmy Stone) 

Terminy 

Zgłoszenia selftape /sobota 14.03 godzina 16:00 

Recall / 17.03 

Przymiarki kostiumów /25.03

Zdjęcia /29-31.03 (jeden lub dwa dni zdj)

Stawki

ROLE  DRUGOPLANOWE

1500zł /dzień zdjęciowy

3000zł /prawa

Jeden dzień lub dwa dni między 29.03 a 31.03

Proszę o zgłaszanie się osób na adres Mailowy

plan@filmakcja.pl

W tytule proszę wpisać rolę. W mailu proszę o podanie imienia, nazwiska, wieku, zdjęć sylwetki oraz twarzy i wizytówki.

Zainteresowanym panom wyślę kartę oraz scenkę do nagrania.

📇 

Czekam na wasze zgłoszenia 

Marta 🎥 Filmakcja

items.text:
**Free Self-Tape Coaching This Week for Qualified Actors **

**(New Actors Welcome) **

(Normally $65)

If you’ve sent in a pile of Self-Tapes last year and gotten nothing but silence back, that messes with your head. You start replaying your choices. You tweak wardrobe. You second guess the read. You wonder if casting directors even watched past the slate.

Most actors I talk to aren’t missing talent. They’re missing clarity.

They’re “acting” instead of being a real person in a real place having a real experience. And nobody ever slowed down long enough to show them the difference.

That’s where I come in.

This week, I’m opening up a limited number of **Free Zoom Coaching and Consultation sessions on your self tapes**.
Normally this is a $65 session.
***This week, it’s free.***

We’ll hop on Zoom, go over a script, and I’ll show you exactly what casting directors are responding to and what’s getting in the way. No fluff. No generic notes. Just clear, practical direction that actually shifts your work.

Work and prepare smarter in 2026 and get results. Feel like and BE a real working actor this year.

Spots are limited and once they’re gone, they’re gone.

**DM me to grab a spot. Name, How long you’v been acting, and Where you’re based.**

***Serious actors only.**

***Must be 18 yrs old.**

sharedPost.text:
Ok y'all... Here's part 1 of our casting call for Tomorrow Is For The Living...

Location: Seattle area
Non-Union
Paid: Indie rates
Shoot dates: TBD
PNW hires only please

Send headshot, resume & reel to gstreetfilms03@gmail.com 
Subject: Tomorrow Casting
Please reference what role you're interested in and we will get back to you with self tape details

Thank you,
Vibrant Entertainment & G-Street Films

(For those having trouble reading the flyer details, here are the character breakdowns)

DETECTIVE MARCUS VANCE
• Age: Late 40’s – early 50’s
• Gender: Male
• Race: Any
• Type: Intense, hardened, physically formidable.
• Description: A veteran detective who carries the weight of the job on his shoulders. Marcus is ruthlessly tidy, spartan, and intensely loyal to his partner, Cole. 

DETECTIVE COLE MADDOX
• Age: Mid to late 40’s
• Gender: Male
• Race: Any (But must match Young Cole)
• Type: Charismatic, athletic, hiding deep trauma.
• Description: Marcus’s partner. On the surface, Cole is charming, easy-going, and aging like fine wine. He relies on tactical Army training to survive.

IRENE (FORMERLY ZOE)
• Age: Late 40’s Early 50s
• Gender: Female
• Race: Any (But must be the same as Zoe)
• Type: Warm but tired, resilient.
• Description: The proprietor of Fat's Restaurant. She is a hard-working woman who has overcome some horrific trauma from her childhood.

DIEGO NAVARRO
• Age: 30s
• Gender: Male
• Race: Hispanic
• Type: Arrogant, flashy, aggressive.
• Description: Navarro's son. He wears heavy gold chains and believes his family name makes him completely untouchable.

HECTOR (AKA "2-Dog")
• Age: 40s
• Gender: Male
• Race: Hispanic preferred but could be any race
• Type: Quiet, lethal, professional.
• Description: Navarro's right-hand man and lead hitman. He is a completely composed killer who moves like a phantom in the shadows.

FRANK
• Age: 30
• Gender: Male
• Race: Any
• Type: Wiry, twitchy, unpredictable.
• Description: A street-level member of Diego's crew. He is impulsive and volatile.

DIEGO'S DRIVER
• Age: 30s-40s
• Gender: Male
• Race: Any
• Type: Hulking, physically imposing.
• Description: Diego's muscle and wheelman.

EXTRAS
• Age: 20s-40s
• Gender: Any
• Race: Any
• Type: Venue patrons, Band members, friends of the cartel members

items.text:
**CASTING CALL - Kinderrolle (Junge, 6-8 Jahre)**

Liebe filminteressierte Familien,

für unseren Kurzfilm „Death Drive“ (AT) von Studierenden der Filmuniversität Babelsberg und der Freien Universität Berlin suchen wir einen Jungen im Spielalter von 6–8 Jahren für die Hauptrolle.

**Details zum Projekt:**
• Drehzeitraum: Ende April 2026
• Voraussichtliche Drehtage: 18. & 19. April sowie 25. & 26. April 2026
• Insgesamt ca. 4 Drehtage in Berlin/Brandenburg
• Keine schauspielerische Vorerfahrung notwendig

• Keine Gage

**Bewerbung:**
Bitte sendet 2–3 aktuelle, natürliche Fotos (Porträt & Ganzkörper – keine Filter, keine professionellen Fotos nötig) sowie ein kurzes Vorstellungsvideo (einfach mit dem Handy aufgenommen) an: [deathdrive.produktion@gmail.com](mailto:deathdrive.produktion@gmail.com)

Bei Anfrage können wir euch gerne mehr Informationen sowie das Drehbuch zukommen lassen. Wir freuen uns sehr über eure Einsendungen und Tipps!

Viele Grüße
Laura

items.text:
Hallo zusammen,

für einen globalen Werbespot mit globalen Nutzungsrechten sind wir aktuell auf der Suche nach einer vierköpfigen Familie.

Es handelt sich um einen Werbespot für einen Drohnen-Controller. Der Dreh ist rein visuell und fängt natürliche Familienmomente im Lifestyle-Kontext ein.

**Gesucht werden:**
* Mama
* Papa
* Junge (8–13 Jahre)
* Mädchen (8–13 Jahre)

**Wichtige Voraussetzungen:**
* Keine sichtbaren Tattoos
* Keine Piercings

**Drehort: Südbayern und Innsbruck**

**Drehtage: **
* **2 Drehtage (Outdoor)**
* **Anreise am Abend vor dem ersten Drehtag**
* **Drehschluss am zweiten Drehtag nach Sonnenuntergang**
* **Drehzeitraum: Zwischen 17.03.-25.03.**

Bei Interesse gerne Fotos, Angebot, Alter und Wohnort an: contact@sindynelia.de

Vielen Dank und liebe Grüße
Sindy Tekieli

topComments.text: Eine wichtige Angaben des Honorares fehlt noch!!

items.text:
CASTING CALL – ROLE OF EMMA (Interest Only)

We are currently seeking expressions of interest for the role of Emma in an upcoming short film project.

This is an interest-only call at this stage. In-person auditions will be scheduled in the near future for shortlisted applicants, possibility of self tapes also but not required at the moment. 

Due to being let down previously, we are specifically looking for an actress who is reliable, committed, and professional, and who is willing to work collaboratively with the production team to plan and lock in shoot dates working around everyone's schedule.

Role: EMMA

Emma is a grounded, emotionally complex character navigating a strained relationship and the realities of adult responsibility. She is well educated and professionally driven. The role requires strong naturalistic performance, emotional subtlety, and confidence in dialogue-driven scenes with some improv.

FILM "It Can Happen To Anyone" centres around a couple who are no longer together but are still living together, the film also highlights issues with vulnerability and homelessness as well as addiction. 

What we’re looking for:

Strong acting ability and emotional authenticity

Comfortable with closeness or romantic scenes (hugging possibly subtle kissing)

Good improv ability with realism for certain takes 

Professional attitude and clear communication

Availability and willingness to commit to the role

Openness to working with production on scheduling and preparation

Playing range 25-35 

Project details:

Short film

London-based 

Shooting schedule to be planned collaboratively, Locations are near New Barnet & Central London (soho, covent garden) etc. 

Looking to enter into film festivals and to serve as show reel for everyone involved. 

Further details shared with selected applicants with possible in person auditions held early summer time May-June.

Fee for this role will be expenses and gratitude fee of between £150-250 with a two day shoot possibly split over separate days with days or weeks in-between each date still to be confirmed. 

If you are interested, please submit:

Headshots

Acting CV or brief experience summary

Showreel link (if available) no big deal

DM this page or email davecaine@hotmail.com. Thanks

We are keen to build a dependable, working relationship with the right actress for this role (based in or available in London), someone looking to add quality footage to their showreel with a strong production and festival exposure.

Thank you for your interest.

attachments.ocrText: May be an image of text that says 'It Can Happen Το Anyone.'

topComments.text: Hi everyone, I have received a few emails so thanks I'm trying to reply to as many as possible, anyone in the comments please send email preferably or DM for questions, dates are to be confirmed as a lot of organisation is still to be done as well as funding. Just looking for interest at the moment. Thank you ! Dave
Hi I’m interested but I’d need to know dates to see if I can fit it in around my other job. I’m near Birmingham but willing to travel x

Agencja STARS poszukuje osób do krótkiej sesji zdjęciowej w klimacie City Break!

 Termin: 13.03
 Lokalizacja: Warszawa – Śródmieście
 Dyspozycyjność: 1h sesja wykonywana w pierwszej połowie dnia- dokładne godziny dostaną osoby wybrane.
(Zdjęcia trwają 30 minut – dokładna godzina zostanie podana po zgłoszeniu dyspozycyjności w podanym dniu).

 O projekcie:
Sesja realizowana jest na użytek wewnętrzny klienta (bez publikacji) – w ramach projektu technologicznego mającego na celu odróżnianie zdjęć profesjonalnych od amatorskich.

 Stawka: 100 zł netto
Płatność po podpisaniu umowy na planie oraz wykonaniu zdjęć!

 Ubiór:
Schludne, nowoczesne stylizacje, kolorowe, jak zdjęcia na insta.
 Bez bieli, czerni oraz czapek zasłaniających twarz.

 Zgłoszenia:
Wyślij email na: o.peczak@stars-impresariat.pl podając imię nazwisko, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie.

Możesz zgłaszać również znajomych i rodzinę, paczkę , z którą lubisz się bawić 

Do zobaczenia na planie!

items.text:
Your weekly international comedy meetup in the heart of Warsaw ❣️🤍
Live comedy. Real presence. Shared space.

We host a weekly English-language comedy night where people come together to laugh, listen, and connect in the same room.

Stand-up, improv, and occasional surprises, always live, always shaped by the people who show up.

It’s not about being the biggest or loudest show in town.
It’s about creating a space where comedy feels human again.
Each night is a little different.
Some shows lean more toward stand-up, others toward improv or playful experimentation. Sometimes something unexpected sneaks in. Nothing is repeated exactly the same way twice.

You’ll see a mix of bold local and international comedians, first-timers taking their first five minutes on stage, and more experienced performers trying new material in front of a real audience.

We’re not chasing trends.
We’re simply building something consistent, welcoming, and alive.
Hosted by Miguel Ferreira
A Brazilian comedian based in Warsaw, curious about people, culture, and what happens when strangers laugh together.

Why this exists
Because people miss being in rooms.
Because shared laughter still works.
Because live moments feel different when you’re actually there.
This isn’t background entertainment.
It’s something you’re part of.
Schedule
Happy Hour & Meet & Greet: 7:00 PM
Show starts: 8:00 PM
Location
Południk Zero
Wilcza 25, Warsaw
15 minutes from Pałac Kultury

🎟 Tickets:
https://fienta.com/2-0-comedy-show2-154404

🐾 Well-behaved pets are welcome.
🎤 Thinking about performing?

Each show keeps one spot open for a first-time performer.
Five minutes. One mic. A real audience.
📍 Impact Warsaw
Instagram: @impactwarsaw, @miguelatcomedy
Events: impactwarsaw.com/events
Inner Circle: https://t.me/+xJpuxiG5Au8xMmZk
If you’re curious, you’re welcome.
If you need a break from scrolling, come sit with us.
Just show up and see what happens.

sharedPost.text:
***AUDITION NOTICE***

BEYOND THE SEA (Staged Reading)

Author: Kristen DaSilva
Director: Chris Schuessler
Producer: Michele Partridge

**Audition Date: Wednesday, April 1, 6 PM
**Preparation: Sides will be emailed to selected auditioners
Production Dates: May 28-31, 2026 - Staged Reading
Rehearsals and Show Venue: Peninsula Productions, 14600 North Bluff Road, White Rock
Rehearsals: TBD
Actors are paid an honourarium and get free parking

Play Summary:
A staged reading of a bittersweet Canadian rom-com. Two 40-something strangers meet on a
small town pier - Theo waits for an overdue date who may or may not show up, while Gwen works
the ticket booth for a Ghost Tour boat ride. Theo frets over everything from his outfit choice to text
compositions, while Gwen calms him with dating advice and embarrassing stories of her own. As
the two slowly open up to each other, the play explores the strange tenderness of starting over
while struggling with loss and grief. Talk back after each show.

Characters:

THEO (40s) - has been cast

GWEN (40s) - is the emotional heart of Beyond the Sea by Kristen Da Silva. A widowed woman
living in a small seaside town, s h e is strong, capable, and quietly resilient, having built a life shaped
by love and sudden loss. Beneath her practical exterior lies deep grief, vulnerability, and a longing
she scarcely allows herself to acknowledge. The actor must be able to balance toughness with
tenderness, conveying both sharp wit and raw emotional honesty. Strong grounding in naturalistic
performance is essential, with the ability to navigate humour, silence, and heartbreak with
authenticity.

**To secure an audition time, please email your headshot and resume to:
Michele Partridge  - michele@peninsulaproductions.org by Sunday, March 29, 2026

We look forward to hearing from you!

www.peninsulaproductions.org

 #auditions #actors #stagedreading #whiterockbc #performers #supportlocal #southsurreybc #community #theatre #PeninsulaProductions

Mężczyzna o bardzo dużej sylwetce, zapaśnik, kulturysta, albo ktoś potężny o 2m wzroście. 

Terminy 

Zgłoszenia selftape /sobota 14.03 godzina 16:00

Recall / 17.03 

Przymiarki kostiumów /25.03

Zdjęcia /29-31.03 (jeden lub dwa dni zdj)

Stawki 🙂

1000zł /dzień zdjęciowy

1500zł /prawa

Proszę o podsyłanie zgłoszeń na adres mailowy- plan@filmakcja.pl

W tytule proszę wpisać Mięśniak i daty nagrań.

Proszę w mailu umieścić - imię, nazwisko wiek tel, wyraźne zdjęcia twarzy oraz sylwetki.

Proszę też umieścić wizytówkę:

Wówczas wyślę kartę castingową, i scenkę do odegrania oraz ling do zgłoszenia. 

Marta Filmakcja😀
items.title: Zapraszam na Casting 🌵

items.text:
Grupa S.O.S. poszukuje aktora / aktorki do współpracy do nagrań rolek firmowych w Krakowie

 

Do realizacji krótkich materiałów wideo (rolki do social media) dla naszej firmy poszukujemy osoby, która wystąpi przed kamerą.

Zakres:

•            udział w nagraniach krótkich rolek promocyjnych

•            odgrywanie prostych scenek związanych z usługami firmy

•            nagrania w swobodnej, naturalnej formie

Oferujemy:

•            stawkę 50 zł/h

•            krótkie, kilkugodzinne sesje nagraniowe

•            luźną i przyjazną atmosferę na planie

•            możliwość stałej współpracy przy kolejnych materiałach

Kogo szukamy:

•            osoby swobodnie czującej się przed kamerą

•            komunikatywnej i naturalnej w nagraniach

•            dyspozycyjnej na nagrania w Krakowie

 

Jeśli jesteś zainteresowany/a, wyślij przykładowe nagranie lub zdjęcie.

topComments.text: Stawki dla aktorów zawodowych są oczywiście wyższe, dlatego piszcie, że szukacie osób do udziału w Waszych filmach. Aktorstwo to nasz wyuczony zawód, a nie dodatkowe zajęcie przy normalnej pracy. Pozdrawiam .🙂
Priv

items.text:
📣 Casting Call!
Currently seeking background actors/extras for a well-known production company/label. The shoot (non-union, unpaid) will be in Los Angeles, 3/14, with copy, credit, & meals provided! 

Seeking: 
• 10 M or F, any race/ethnicity (21-60), to act as high-art enthusiasts, art gallery attendees (10-6 PM) 
•  5 M or F, any race/ethnicity to play as art gallery staff, or (2) waiters (10 - 6 PM) 
• 1 F, BIPOC performer, (20s), (~ 6-10 PM). 

Subject of your email: Short - 3/14 - [Position] - Name. 

Please email your resume, headshot, & position(s) interested in, to riannamamitag1@gmail.com !

items.text:
Casting-Aufruf für Kurzfilmprojekt -- Proof of Concept Phase --Leidenschaftliche Zusammenarbeit -- Kassel

Hallo ihr Lieben! Ich arbeite derzeit an einem Kurzfilmprojekt in Kassel und suche begeisterte Schauspieler sowie einen 1st AC (Kameraassistenten/Focus puller), die mit uns zusammenarbeiten möchten. [Weitere freiwillige Crewmitglieder (sowie Maske, Ton, Helfer, etc.) sind willkommen.] Wir befinden uns aktuell in der Proof-of-Concept-Phase, in der wir eine Szene drehen werden, um anschließend eine Finanzierung für die vollständige Produktion zu sichern.

**Über das Projekt:**
* Titel: ALL IN
* Genre: Psychologischer Thriller
* Dauer: Circa 40
* Dauer Proof-of-Concept: 5 min
* Sprache: Englisch (Setsprache noch offen)
* Synopsis: Die Geschichte dreht sich um ein Pokerspiel, das als Plattform für vier Hauptfiguren dient, die sich mit ihrer Vergangenheit auseinandersetzen. Diese werden durch intensive Rückblenden dargestellt.

**Unser Vorgehen:**
* Wir drehen zunächst eine Testszene als Proof of Concept.
* Dieses Material wird genutzt, um ein Budget für die vollständige Produktion zu sichern.
* Table Read ist für April geplant und wird auf Englisch durchgeführt werden.
* Der Dreh des Proof-of-Concepts wird ebenfalls auf Englisch stattfinden.

**Wichtige Hinweise:**
* Schauspieler für Hauptrollen sollten bereit sein, sich Wissen über psychische Erkrankungen und deren charakteristische Merkmale anzueignen, um die Authentizität der Darstellungen zu erhöhen.
* Erforderliche Fähigkeiten: Darstellungen, die komplexe Emotionen wie Trauma, Konfrontation und Verzweiflung authentisch vermitteln; mit Fokus auf subtilem und realistischem Schauspiel.

**Gesuchte Rollen:** Wir sind bereits ein kleines Team, möchten aber trotzdem alle gesuchten Rollen hier noch einmal auflisten.

**Hauptfiguren:**
* Chris (25-40 Jahre) -- zurückgezogen, emotional aufgeladen, trägt eine schwere Last mit sich. Subtil, nie übertrieben.
* K (32-40 Jahre) -- instabil, verzweifelt, zwischen Kontrolle und Zusammenbruch.
> *John -- BESETZT -- dominant, arrogant, aber mit einer tiefen Verletzlichkeit darunter. Muss beides gleichzeitig spielen können.*
> *Trevor -- BESETZT -- kühl, unlesbar, beobachtend. Wenig Text, maximale Wirkung.*

**Nebenrollen:**
* Charlotte (15-17 Jahre) -- warm, fürsorglich, die emotionale Mitte des Films. Ihre Szene ist klein aber entscheidend. -- EVTL. BESETZT --
* Chris, jung (13-14 Jahre) -- wütend, verletzt, noch nicht in der Lage dies auszudrücken. Muss Stille spielen können.
* Vater (Stimme, kein Bild -- vorerst keine Erscheinung vor der Kamera notwendig) -- autoritär, kalt.
* Mutter (Details folgen)

**Weitere Informationen:**
* Essen wird zur Verfügung gestellt (mit veganer Option).
* Drehorte sind im Raum Kassel.
* Für die Proof-of-Concept-Phase kann leider keine Gage gezahlt werden. Anfahrtskosten können jedoch nach Absprache gegebenenfalls übernommen werden.
* Für die vollständige Produktion sind wir aktiv dabei, ein Budget zu sichern. Je nach gesicherter Finanzierung wird eine Gage für alle Darsteller angestrebt.
* Alle Beteiligten erhalten vollständige Credits sowie eine Kopie des fertigen Films.

Wenn du Interesse an einer kreativen, kollaborativen Zusammenarbeit und Lust darauf hast , deine Leidenschaft in einem atmosphärischen Projekt auszuleben, melde dich gerne bei mir! Teile den Beitrag gerne, wenn du jemanden kennst, der interessiert sein könnte. Ich freue mich darauf, von euch zu hören! mail: [maxmeyer414@gmail.com](mailto:maxmeyer414@gmail.com)

items.text:
Jeremy Holzl am Set: Respekt für Deine Beständigkeit 

Jeremy, diese drei Bilder stehen für genau das, was am Set zählt: stille Verlässlichkeit, echte Kollegialität und ein Mensch, auf den man sich einfach freuen kann und all dies mit drei Deiner starken unverwechselbaren Gesichtsausdrücke! 

Als Komparse, u. a. in der RTL Serie "Alles was zählt" und "Unter uns" bist Du nicht nur jemand, der da ist, wenn es drauf ankommt, sondern jemand, der mit Haltung, Respekt und einer angenehm ruhigen Art das Setklima spürbar besser macht. Genau diese Beständigkeit, dieses unaufgeregte Dranbleiben, macht am Ende den Unterschied, weil damit Schritt für Schritt Dinge möglich werden, die vorher nur wie ein Wunsch wirkten. 

Und dann kommt noch etwas dazu, das viele unterschätzen: Du bist auch Fahrer für ein Unternehmen, das Schauspieler zuverlässig ans Set und in Hotels bringt. Das heißt, Du hältst Abläufe am Laufen, bevor die Kamera überhaupt angeht, und genau dafür gebührt Dir genauso Anerkennung wie für alles, was man im Bild sieht. 

Wir zwei, Christian und Sandra, sind jedes Mal wirklich froh, wenn wir am Set mit Dir sind, weil Du genau diese Mischung mitbringst: professionell, menschlich, kollegial. Danke, dass Du so bist, wie Du bist, und dass Du Deine Energie so konstant in dieses Umfeld gibst. 

Wenn Du Jeremy schon am Set erlebt hast, was schätzt Du an seiner Art am meisten, und wen sollte ich als nächstes mit so einer Collage ehren?

Idee, Bilder und Text Christian Weiße und Sandra Wötzel 

#JeremyHolzl #AllesWasZaehlt #UnterUns #RTL #SetLife

topComments.text: Jeremy Hölzl das kleine aber feine Shooting mit Dir war super. Danke für Dein FAIRtrauen in meine Augen und Kamera. Christian Weiße

items.text:
[CASTING/CREW CALL][LA] “THE PERFECT SHOT” — A Rom-Com Short Film / El Segundo / SMC / UCLA

**Logline:** A pretentious film student, struggling to find his "authentic voice," discovers his muse (and his cluelessness) when he is forced to partner with a bubbly theatre girl for a class project.

CREW CALL: DP, 1st AC, and PA’s

CASTING CALL: Extras, 18-25

COMPENSATION: Crew  based on experience level. 

CONTACT: [Maxwell.christian.montogmery@gmail.com](mailto:Maxwell.christian.montogmery@gmail.com) 

Hello world! 

I’m a student director putting together a passion project short film this month, and I’m looking for a few key crew members to help bring this silly little rom-com to life. This is funded by ourselves (feeding crew, credit, portfolio fuel, and good vibes), but the locations are locked and the script is tight.

**The Vibe:** Think (500) Days of Summer meets the awkward sincerity of a Wes Anderson student film. It’s a funny, sweet, low-stakes story about how artists sometimes need to get out of their own heads.

**Shoot Dates:** [TBD, Prospective: March 20-23 or March 27-30th] (1-2 weekend days, plus potential pickup day)
**Locations:** El Segundo / UCLA Campus / Santa Monica College Campus

**We are currently looking for:**
* Director of Photography (DP):

Someone who loves natural light and can handle a mix of interior dialogue scenes and fun, energetic exterior walking shots. We have a specific look in mind (warm, slightly contrasty) and would like a collaborator, someone with some knowledge and perspective, but doesn't need to be an expert. We have a scene shot up in the catwalks over the main stage at SMC, so **must be okay with heights.** We may also get access to the light board to shoot some lights up into the catwalk to assist our own lighting in the scene, so a huge opportunity to experiment with both theatre and film lights to shape the look of our scenes.
* 1st AC: Need someone reliable to keep us on schedule, our image in focus, and our set transitions tight. We will likely be shooting on a mirrorless system (Sony/FX series) OR A BMPCC 6K. 
* Production Assistants (PA’s):** Eager to learn? Need set experience? This is a chill set with a small crew. Your main jobs will be crowd control at public locations, wrangling gear, and craftys/snacks.

**Special Shout-out to Santa Monica College Students:**

If you are currently at **SMC** (or know someone who is) and are an actor looking for on-set experience, **PLEASE reach out.** We are filming a key scene at the SMC Performing Arts Center and would love to populate the background with real students to make the world feel authentic.

**Compensation:** **Credit, Digital Copy, Meals/Snacks, and my undying gratitude.** This is a student/independent project intended for festival submission and portfolio reels. Open to discussion to pay DP, AC and Sound, so don't hesitate to ask! **Just a heads up that this budget is pretty stark, so nothing over $500 please. **Once we get the big bucks, we'll be more than happy to accommodate your expertise :)

**To Apply:**

Please DM me with your role of interest and a link to your portfolio/reel or IG. If you're an SMC actor, just send a headshot or a selfie and tell me your availability.

Let's make something fun!

**serial fabularny – EPIZODY DZIECIĘCE**

 

Na wiosnę ruszamy z nowym serialem fabularnym, a do którego teraz szukamy **CHŁOPCÓW 8-10 LAT z doświadczeniem** **epizodycznym** na planach zdjęciowych.

Chłopcy muszą płynnie mówić po polsku, bez akcentu.

Chętnie zobaczymy tu bliźniaków.

🏀 **PAID NBA COMMERCIAL – BASKETBALL PLAYERS WANTED (ALL AGES)**

Hi everyone! My name is Jude, and I’m reaching out from House of Talent. We’re currently casting for an exciting paid commercial project for the NBA and are looking for amazing basketball players of all ages who may be a great fit.

We would love to connect with players, families, and coaches who might be interested in this opportunity!

Details:

• Ages 2 – 65+

• Non-Union

• Filming in Los Angeles

• Shoot Date: March 13

Compensation:

• $1000 + 20% per day filming

• $3000 + 20% usage

If you or someone you know might be a great fit, please submit or let them know!

**How to Apply**

Interested players or teams can view the full project details and submit directly through our secure casting portal, please make sure to select the right category. 

**Coaches / Referees**[ https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com](https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com/)

**Players**

- Under 7 - [https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/](https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/)

- 7- 13 years old -[ https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-kids-7-13](https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-kids-7-13)

- 14 - 15 years old [https://bballteens1415.castingcrane.com/](https://bballteens1415.castingcrane.com/)

- 17 - 20 years old [https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-elite-17-20](https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-elite-17-20)

- 40+ [ https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/](https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/)

🏀 **PAID NBA COMMERCIAL – BASKETBALL PLAYERS WANTED (ALL AGES)**

Hi everyone! My name is Jude, and I’m reaching out from House of Talent. We’re currently casting for an exciting paid commercial project for the NBA and are looking for amazing basketball players of all ages who may be a great fit.

We would love to connect with players, families, and coaches who might be interested in this opportunity!

Details:

• Ages 2 – 65+

• Non-Union

• Filming in Los Angeles

• Shoot Date: March 13

Compensation:

• $1000 + 20% per day filming

• $3000 + 20% usage

If you or someone you know might be a great fit, please submit or let them know!

**How to Apply**

Interested players or teams can view the full project details and submit directly through our secure casting portal, please make sure to select the right category. 

**Coaches / Referees**[ https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com](https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com/)

**Players**

- Under 7 - [https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/](https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/)

- 7- 13 years old -[ https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-kids-7-13](https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-kids-7-13)

- 14 - 15 years old [https://bballteens1415.castingcrane.com/](https://bballteens1415.castingcrane.com/)

- 17 - 20 years old [https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-elite-17-20](https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-elite-17-20)

- 40+ [ https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/](https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/)

items.text:
This audition will be held right after our workshop Zanni Madness... Oops All Zanni happening THIS Sunday, 3:00-6:00 at the City in Motion Dance Theater, Inc. studio. Entrance in the rear of the studio. 
Registration for this and other upcoming workshops can be found at byrdproductions.org

textReferences.short_name: City in Motion Dance Theater, Inc.

sharedPost.text:
Well, OUR minds are blown! We've been curated to be in this year's KC Fringe Festival!!! 🤯🤯🤯 With that news, we will be holding an audition for that show directly after this workshop. 
Those auditioning will be provided with sides to read. We'll try different character types and situations with each person. 
This audition will be held 6:15 - 7:00 this Sunday. Walk-ins are welcome.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – SHORT FILM
Title: SENSE OF LOSS

After losing his sister in a post-apocalyptic world, a brother consumed by revenge sets out with nothing left to lose. But as he pushes deeper into darkness, one question remains, is revenge worth losing your humanity?

Non-Union | Volunteer

Filming Date: March 14

Seeking Actors:

( Jack )Male – 25–29

( Natasha ) Female – 19–25

Child - 10–15

For more information pls contact and send headshots to dromani1999@gmail.com

sharedPost.text:
La chanteuse 

Was ich Dir/ Ihnen biete:

- eine fundierte Atmung
- Stütztraining
- Lockerung deines Stimmapparates
- individuelle Stimmübungen
- Stimmsitz
- Erweiterung deiner Gesangsrange
- individuelle Repertoireauswahl
- Texterarbeitung in deutsch / englisch / italienisch / französisch 
- Vorbereitung auf Castings / Auditions
- das Loslassen beim Singen und   Performen
- Üben am jeweiligen Chorrepertoire
- Training für ein selbstbewusstes Auftreten / Ausstrahlung 
- wie bleibe ich sängerisch authentisch 
-wie lerne ich Emotionen in Musik umzusetzen 

Ich freue mich auf genau Dich!

Weitere Informationen unter:
annettekuhngreiner@gmail.com 

Ihre/ Eure 
Annette Kuhn
www.annette-kuhn.de

˚₊✩‧₊ CASTING CALL ˚₊✩‧₊
We are still looking to cast our main love interest- Freddie! 

“Pufferfish” tells the story of a young woman with Autism Spectrum Disorder (ASD) navigating the dating world. She goes on several dates until she finally meets Freddie; who she thinks is the one.

This is an unpaid project but travel and catering will be provided! Shooting will be in Mid - April.

If you are interested please reach out via DM on our instagram @pufferfish.short or email us at pufferfish.short@gmail.com 

We can’t wait to hear from you! ˚₊✩‧₊

items.text:
# **URGENT CASTING CALL **
## **STUDENT FILM | 10-12 mins | LONDON BASED | FILMING MARCH 13-15**

Looking for supporting actors to play presidential advisors in a short film made by students at the University of Westminster on **March 13, 14, and 15**, with call times around 9:00 AM and wrap at 20-21:00, though it varies by day. 

**Unpaid role, but travel is reimbursed, and catering is provided.**

Orange Monday is a political dark comedy, and we're preferably looking **for men aged 55-80.**

Please contact w2093545@westminster.ac.uk with a headshot if interested and available.

items.text:
Hi guys! 

Posting for a second time as we’re still on the hunt! Also have slightly more info to share. Please read below carefully and send me a message if you fit the profile and are interested in auditioning. 

I’m urgently casting for a new TV series shooting in London from the end of May. 

I need a young white male 18 - 24. You need to be funny, wild and a rule breaker. AGE is really important!!! They also need to be from London. The more authentic the better! 

Also looking for another male actor 18 - 21 for another role in the same show. This character is an estate agent with much higher ambitions. Slightly reserved but willing to bend rules to get the job done. 

Please comment below or send me a DM for more info. We are casting urgently so need to move fairly quickly. Free agents are preferable but not necessary. Get in touch asap!!

items.text:
**URGENT CASTING CALL - ISO 1 Actor for March 13**

Casting a minor role for a Sheridan College student short film titled *Face the Heel*.  If interested, please email [delucabi@sheridancollege.ca](mailto:delucabi@sheridancollege.ca) or DM on @bianca_davinci Instagram.  Please do not DM me on Facebook.  Thank you!

**Synopsis:  **With 24 hours on the clock, a stripper and a nepo-baby compete to be "Editorial Assistant" for the leading newspaper.

**Auditions: **No auditions required, please send a headshot as well as a resume and/or demo reel

**Deadline: **Mar. 12

**Location:**  Oakville, ON

**Film Type: **Non-union, unpaid, short film

**Shoot Date: **March 13th, 7am - 10am

*********

***CASTING*****:**

Casting for The Executer: New Blood is officially coming to a close.  

After reviewing an incredible amount of submissions and talent, casting will be ending this Monday. This is the final chance for actors who want to be part of this brutal new chapter.

If you’ve been thinking about submitting — now is the time.

items.text:
I dag lavede min svigermor aftensmad med hakket oksekød, men hun skyllede det ikke. Jeg kunne ikke spise det, og jeg sørgede også for, at mine børn holdt sig væk. Jeg skyller altid hakket oksekød, inden jeg tilbereder det. Det er chokerende, at hun ikke gør det samme. Er det ikke et must?

Opskrift i kommentarerne.

items.text:
Zoom Auditions for Game Show “Funny You Should Ask” (2026) 

Ready to bring your personality, quick wit, and love of comedy to a game show stage? “Funny You Should Ask” is now casting fun, outgoing contestants to play alongside a panel of celebrity comedians for a chance to win up to $6,800.

This fast-paced comedy game show is all about big laughs and clever guessing—contestants compete for cash while celebrity comics deliver hilarious answers.

Eligibility note: Applicants must be 21+ and within driving distance to Los Angeles.

Casting Details

Audition Location: Zoom

Category: General Performers / Game Show Contestants

Payment: Paid (prize/cash competition)

Potential Winnings: Up to $6,800

Age: 21+

Must be: Within driving distance to Los Angeles

How to Apply

Fill out the official application here:

Application: https://funnyyoushouldask.castingcrane.com/

If you’re a great fit, the casting team will reach out to schedule:

A quick 15-minute Zoom interview

Want to see the vibe of the show?

Clips: https://www.instagram.com/funnyyoushouldaskes/

Questions?

If you have trouble with the link or need help, email:

alexpellerincasting@gmail.com

**#GameShowCasting** **#FunnyYouShouldAsk** **#CastingCall** **#ZoomAuditions** **#TVContestant#ComedyGameShow#RealityTVCasting** **#LosAngelesCasting** **#PaidOpportunity#ContestantSearch** **#WinCash** **#CastingCrane**

ISO: PAID **SFX Makeup Artist Needed – Short Film Production (Atlanta, GA)**

**Project Type:** Narrative/Period themed Short Film
**Filming Dates:** March 21–23, 2026
**Location:** Atlanta, Georgia

**Responsibilities:**
* Provide on-set makeup for **6 actors** (4 African American actors and 2 White American actors)
* Design and apply **bruise and facial injury effects** for ONE principal character (final shoot day)

**Requirements:**
* Experience with **SFX makeup**, particularly bruising and injury effects
* Experience working with **diverse skin tones**
* Ability to work efficiently on set and handle quick touch-ups between takes
* Must provide your **own makeup kit **

**Submission Instructions:**
Please send the following for consideration:
* Your **day rate**
* **Kit fee**
* **Portfolio / examples of previous work**
* Resume or brief description of experience

position filled. Thanks to everyone who applied!

items.text:
We are casting a series of fast-paced, 30-second (UNPAID) STUDENT PROJECT Specsaver adverts paying homage to the legendary, culturally iconic "Should've gone to..." advertising campaign. This project is all about visual humour, oblivious confidence, and impeccable comedic timing.

We are looking for actors who excel at deadpan delivery and physical comedy. If you can play a character who is hilariously, confidently, and completely wrong about their surroundings, we want to see you!

We will cover meals and drinks as well as travel (Within the merseyside area)

filmed on high quality professional equipment as well as a professional environment and crew

This project will provide you with:
-Showreel footage material
-On-screen credits
-acting experience with a professionally run student production

IF INTERESTED MESSAGE ME PRIVATELY OR APPLY ON OUR MANDY 

https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3113999/specsaver-ads/

Help me get the word out to families! I’ll be attaching a flyer—please feel free to share it with your database and post on social media.

If you know a teacher or mentor who would like to be featured, I’d love to connect with them as well.

Call or email me with any questions. Thank you for helping spread the word

Make sure they mention your program and my name when applying and I can fast track their applications straight to the producers 

 NOW CASTING! 

Know a curious kid who loves building, tinkering, coding, or experimenting?

A brand-new **Netflix competition series — Schooled! — from Mark Rober’s CrunchLabs is looking for bright young minds ages 9–17 to compete in teams of two for an INSANELY HUGE cash prize. 

 Creative thinkers

 Robotics lovers

 Problem solvers

 Hands-on builders

Kids can apply solo or with a partner (friend, classmate, sibling, or STEM teammate).

 Parents must apply with their kids.

Please share with your friends, family, followers — anyone who might know an amazing young inventor, builder, or future engineer.

Apply here: [https://crunchlabsacademy.com/](https://crunchlabsacademy.com/)

items.text:
🏀 **PAID NBA COMMERCIAL – BASKETBALL PLAYERS WANTED (ALL AGES)**

Hi everyone! My name is Jude, and I’m reaching out from House of Talent. We’re currently casting for an exciting paid commercial project for the NBA and are looking for amazing basketball players of all ages who may be a great fit.

We would love to connect with players, families, and coaches who might be interested in this opportunity!

Details:

• Ages 2 – 65+

• Non-Union

• Filming in Los Angeles

• Shoot Date: March 13

Compensation:

• $1000 + 20% per day filming

• $3000 + 20% usage

If you or someone you know might be a great fit, please submit or let them know!

**How to Apply**

Interested players or teams can view the full project details and submit directly through our secure casting portal, please make sure to select the right category. 

**Coaches / Referees**[ https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com](https://refereesandcoaches.castingcrane.com/)

**Players**

- Under 7 - [https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/](https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/)

- 7- 13 years old -[ https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-kids-7-13](https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-kids-7-13)

- 14 - 15 years old [https://bballteens1415.castingcrane.com/](https://bballteens1415.castingcrane.com/)

- 17 - 20 years old [https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-elite-17-20](https://nest.castingcrane.com/dashboard/casting-calls/bball-elite-17-20)

- 40+ [ https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/](https://bballyoungandolder.castingcrane.com/)

items.title: (no title)

items.text:
A wonderful good evening everyone! 

We in Connecting Arts are searching one more dancer to join our dance teams in Greece this summer! 

Rehearsal start in Greece 20.04 (show start beginning of May) -   mid / end of October. 

Each team is performing several various themed shows in 4* and 5* resorts. 

We are searching a dancer with a strong technical base, good work ethic,  great stage presence and willingness to adapt to new styles and skills. 

All artists must be registered as self employed, and hold a EU passport or full EU visa. 

Kindly forward your material to office@connecting-arts.at 

We are looking forward to hearing from you!

items.title: A wonderful good evening everyone!

items.text:
Hi everyone!
My name is Ben, I’m a French actor based in France and frequently in London (where I previously lived). I’m available to travel anywhere in the UK for projects.

I’m a trilingual actor: French (native), English (fluent with a neutral accent). I also have basic Arabic and Spanish.

My background is mainly in theatre amateur. 
I’ve also appeared in film projects, including a small student project in the UK and a role in a cinema film in France. Alongside acting, I’m currently working on writing feature film projects.

I’m open to all kinds of collaborations :
Short films, independent productions, student projects and larger productions.

Currently non-represented. 
Available year-round.

Showreel / clip: https://vimeo.com/1020366289?fl=pl&fe=sh

Feel free to DM me if you’re working on a project.

Ben Iliss.

items.text:
CASTING CALL – UK PROJECT

Further to my last post, we are now casting for two more roles for the same web series project shooting in the UK. Please see the character breakdowns below.

1. Journalist No. 2
 • Female
 • British African or African-American
 • Playing age: Early 30s 
 • Accent: American accent required
 • Shoot: 1 day
 • Dates: Tentatively end of April or early May
 • Location: UK
 • Rate: £300 per day + expenses covered
       .      Character :Eeccentric and unconventional     journalist with a bold personality

2. Assistant Director
 • Indian male actor
 • Playing age: Early 20s
 • Character: Shy, awkward personality (must be   able to portray awkwardness naturally)
 • Language: Must speak fluent Hindi
 • Shoot: 1 day
 • Dates: Tentatively end of April or early May
 • Location: UK
 • Rate: £300 per day + expenses covered

Submission Details :

Please send your Spotlight link only to the email below.

If you do not have Spotlight, please email two photographs and details of your acting training or experience.

Email: Farhan.baqi@mcccuk.co.uk

DEADLINE FOR APPLICATIONS : THURSDAY 12th MARCH 2026

Kind regards,
Farhan Baqi
MCCC

items.text:
📣 Casting Call!
Currently seeking background actors/extras for a well-known production company/label. The shoot (non-union, unpaid) will be in Los Angeles, 3/14, with copy, credit, & meals provided! 

Seeking: 
• 10 M or F, any race/ethnicity (21-60), to act as high-art enthusiasts, art gallery attendees (10-6 PM) 
•  5 M or F, any race/ethnicity to play as art gallery staff, or (2) waiters (10 - 6 PM) 
• 1 F, BIPOC performer, (20s), (~ 6-10 PM). 

Subject of your email: Short - 3/14 - [Position] - Name. 

Please email your resume, headshot, & position(s) interested in, to riannamamitag1@gmail.com !

🎭 Scrambling when opportunities hit? Freezing when asked what you're working on? Not seeing momentum despite doing all the things?

You're not behind — you need a system.

My friend & career coach Jodie Bentley (20+ years in the biz) is hosting **a FREE 5-Day Training, March 16–20:**

**🔥 The In-Demand Actor Blueprint — Get Clear. Get Specific. Get Working.**

She's helped actors sign with agents, book commercials, land Broadway & TV leads, and create their own opportunities. In one week, she'll show you how.

👉 **Register here: **[https://paykstrt.com/55516/166429](https://paykstrt.com/55516/166429)**  **

The industry hasn't stopped. Your career doesn't have to either.

WARSZAWA 23.03.2026r. 

Tym razem do filmu fabularnego o znanym sportowcu poszukujemy Pani epizodystki w średnim / średnio zaawansowanym wieku. Szczególnie prosilibyśmy o zgłoszenia od Pań, które posiadają naturalnie kręcone włosy lub własną trwałą.

STAWKA 250 zł 

Zgłoszenia proszę wysyłać na maila: agata@podtytulem.pl
W tytule maila: A23
Zgłoszenia muszą zawierać: imię i nazwisko, wiek, numer telefonu oraz aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki, najlepiej z dnia zgłoszenia. 
ZDJĘCIE TWARZY: Portretowe selfie w dziennym świetle, na wprost, patrząc w obiektyw. Bez żadnych filtrów. Bez okularów. Bez nakrycia głowy. Kolorowe. 

Widzimy się na planie!

items.text:
🍿CASTING - ROLA AKTORSKA🍿

Do nowego projektu filmowego poszukujemy chłopców w wieku 13-18 lat o większej posturze ciała.

Nie wymagamy doświadczenia aktorskiego - najważniejsze są naturalność, osobowość i chęć spróbowania swoich sił przed kamerą 🙂

Zdjęcia planowane są wstępnie od czerwca.

Stawka będzie ustalana indywidualnie po etapie castingu. 

Zgłoszenie powinno zawierać:
  • aktualne zdjęcie twarzy i sylwetki
  • krótką wizytówkę wideo (kilka zdań o sobie)
  • dane kontaktowe, wiek oraz miasto zamieszkania
 
Zgłoszenia z tytułem “CHŁOPIEC” prosimy wysyłać na adres:

📧CASTING@OBSADOWI.PL

Skontaktujemy się z wybranymi osobami :)

**CASTING CALL — AKTOR DO ROLI WIZERUNKOWEJ (FINTECH PROJECT)**

Do realizacji wizerunkowego spotu dla młodej firmy z branży fintech poszukujemy aktora:

**Profil:**
* mężczyzna w wieku 30–45 lat
* biznesowy, profesjonalny wygląd
* naturalna prezencja przed kamerą
* komunikatywny język angielski (min. poziom B2/C1 — wymagane nagranie próbki)

**Szczegóły:**
* zdjęcia w Warszawie
* zaangażowanie: ok. pół dnia zdjęciowego
* termin: do ustalenia (w najbliższym czasie)
* produkcja wizerunkowa / corporate style

Prosimy o przesyłanie:
* aktualnych zdjęć (portret + sylwetka)
* krótkiej próbki wideo w języku angielskim
* informacji o dostępności

Zgłoszenia prosimy wysyłać w wiadomości prywatnej

items.text:
Today marks 3 years since my book Games and the Fight: An Untold Story reached #1 on the Hottest New Releases list in the Boxing category. 🥊📚

The book shares my journey growing up in Melbourne as a first-generation Australian, navigating life with my mixed heritage, and finding my path through boxing and hip hop. It’s a raw look at the fight game, the culture around it, and the life lessons that shaped who I am today.

If you’d like to check it out or support the book, you can grab a copy here:https://amzn.asia/d/0cV9wEj1

Appreciate everyone who has supported my journey over the years.

– Benny Sinclair

items.text:
Til tv-serien De Bedste Familier (DR) søges i Jylland:

Ledig, mandlig statistrolle, alder ca. 30 - 45 år, som funktionær. 
Du skal kunne være med til begge optagelsesdage
16/3 ca. 15 - 02.30 og igen 17/3 ca. kl. 11 - 22.30 i Handest Jylland.

Der er kostume/sminkeprøve i Agger på tirsdag d. 10. marts et aftalt tidspunkt ml. 14-19.

Der er i alt 1800 kr. honorar for 
2 optagelsesdage og 1 sminke/kostumeprøve. 
Der er forplejning tilpasset tidsrum på optagelsesdage.
Udgifter til f.eks. transport refunderes ikke.
Evt. overnatninger refunderes ikke.

Følgende krav til krop og udseende pga. tilgængelige kostumer og tidsperioden:

NB! Danmark var ikke så beriget med forskellige nationaliteter, så du skal ligne en med dansk/nordeuropæisk herkomst.

MÆND:
max højde 186, tøjstr. S-L (der er ingen kostume i XL eller over), ingen synlige tatoveringer med skjorte på inkl. håndled eller piercinger, hårfarve skal være naturlig og ensfarvet med mindre gråt, korthåret men nok længde til at kunne sætte sideskilning, ingen kronraget eller karseklippet, ingen skæg på optagelsesdage.

Vi skal kende følgende for at komme i betragtning, som skal sendes i en mail til ajlystbaek@hotmail.com

Navn, alder, mobilnummer, højde, tøjstr., skostr., mål: hoved-hals-bryst-talje-hofte og inseam/outseam.
Der skal være to helt nye billeder: vellignende billede i helfigur samt et selfie, hvor hår og ansigt ses tydeligt.

CASTING CALL 📣 PLEASE SHARE 🎭

We are looking for 3 male actors to star in our new upcoming show “A Curtain Calls” at the Epstein theatre in Liverpool city centre in July 2026. Please note we are based in Liverpool, Merseyside so our rehearsals will be taking place in the city centre and it is a PAID PROFIT SHARE production. If any of these characters capture your attention then give us a shout we would love to hear from you ! 🎭 you must be 18+ to apply . For all enquires/ Audition material, please email our admin team at Glassdoorproductions.19@gmail.com ⭐️💫

items.text:
Are you an aspiring actor or filmmaker looking to unleash your talent? We invite you to be part of our dynamic collective! Every Saturday, in Los Angeles we come together to collaborate and bring our cinematic visions to life, creating one high-quality movie each month. Our diverse group includes not just actors, but also passionate writers, skilled DOPs, talented production designers, prop masters, directors, and more. With access to fantastic locations, top-notch equipment, and an enthusiastic crew, we are dedicated to crafting movies that are not only of exceptional quality but also ready for the festival circuit. Become a part of a supportive community where your creativity can flourish!

If you're available and want to join a group of talented and passionate filmmakers, complete this form. https://forms.gle/zd737XUMFmhbXEQt8

items.text:
Hello! My name is Juniellia and I am a dancer/actress/director from NY/NJ looking to FINALLY produce and direct a film I wrote a few years ago. It’s a psychological drama with 1-3 locations, two of which can be worked around! There’s also just about 3 characters with lines and a few background, can still be worked around!

If anyone has any pointers for next steps or tips for the journey, would love to listen! 

(& also will be located in Cali until end of May, if anyone wants to help get it filmed while out here! suuuuuper open to making those connections 🙂

please comment or message me. thank you and I look forward to hearing y’all out 🫶🏽

topComments.text: In San Diego if you need anything!
The best advice I can give you is to raise money to produce your film, people look past that when it is, one of the most important steps if you want to do it right

My name is Anyiah, and I am a graduate student at the USC School of Cinematic Arts as well as the writer and director of the upcoming MFA short film *The Exchange.* I am currently looking for **LA-based actors and crew members** to join the project.

**Shooting dates:** April 4th – 6th and April 11th – 12th.

Please see the graphic for more details about the film. If you are interested in **auditioning or joining the crew**, please scan the QR code in the graphic or complete the appropriate Google interest form using the links below. Additional information about the film, production details, and audition or crew requirements can be found in the forms.

Please note that this is an **unpaid opportunity due to school requirements.**

items.title: CASTING CALL

items.text:
Casting a short student film following 24 year old Mikey who becomes consumed by the growing anxiety that he is running out of time. While everyone around him seem to be moving ahead in life. After receiving a watch he believes is bad luck, it's constant ticking reflects his fear and turns his routines into a race he cant escape.

Through the contrast of his carefree best friend. Skylar he begins to question the pressure he puts on himself. When the watch stops, he realises his fear of falling behind was more limiting that time itself.

This is a visually driven, deeply relatable short film exploring the "quarter-life crisis," the weight of modern expectations, and learning how to finally breathe. We are looking for talented, passionate actors to bring this psychological and emotional journey to life.

Please note: As this is a student production, it is an unpaid role. However, it is a fantastic opportunity to collaborate with an ambitious crew in Liverpool

IF YOU HAVE ANY QUESTIONS PLEASE MESSAGE ME OR IF YOU WANT MORE INFORMATION ABOUT THE PROJECT PLEASE CHECK OUR MANDY POST 

https://www.mandy.com/aa/project/3114924/catching-time/

items.text:
**Casting Call - Volunteer, Non-union, IMDB credit, Snippet**

I'm casting for a comedy film- Vijay Finds His Dating Mojo. I plan to send this film to film festivals and use it as a proof of concept for a feature film. 

**Synopsis-** An immigrant from India, Vijay, takes services from a manipulative dating coach, Jason. After several failures, Vijay decides to discard pickup lines and pretensions and be himself. He meets Sophia, and they hit it off. Will him being honest work out or backfire?

**Casting:**
Jason (23-35) Caucasian, charismatic, manipulative, eloquent, materialistic, pushy, and cynical. He is a dating guru who teaches Vijay dating lessons. Shoot on 11th April. 

Sophia (23-35) Strong and confident, normal to higher-weight, sassy, eloquent, bold, had a recent breakup, and impulsive. Any ethnicity. She had a recent break and is now going through a rebound. Shoot on 11th and 12th April. 

Rumi (23-35) Self-assured, quick-witted, open-minded, and straightforward. Asian. Started a new job as an accountant and overworked. Shoot on 12th April. 

Jessica (23-32) Beautiful, party girl, kind, good listener, has high morals, and is fashionable. Any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April. 

Christine (22-33) Charming, any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April. 

Additional Characters

Tyler- 25-55, honest, humble, and attentive. Any ethnicity.

Bartender experience is plus but not must. Shoot on 12th April. 

Vijay's Father- 45-65, conservative, Southasian, Indian accent (preferably). shoot on 11th April. 

Vijay's Mother- 45-65, conservative, Southasian, Indian accent (preferably). Shoot on 11th April. 

Vijay's date- 35-45, Normal to higher weight, any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April. 

Gym Girl- 25-35, in good shape, any ethnicity. Shoot on 11th April. 

People in Bar- Men and Women in their 20s and 30s. Need 3 women and 3 men. Any ethnicity. Shoot on 12th April. 

**Location:** Vancouver Downtown and Surrey/Langely

**Date:** 11th and 12th April, 2026

**Pay:** Volunteer, IMDB credit, Snippet

**To Apply:**
Please email **tomar.gautam2@yahoo.com** with:
• Resume
• Headshots
• Demo reel (if available)

Subject line: **“Characater and your name”**

items.groupTitle: Film- und Musikschaffende, Schauspieler, Musiker, Darsteller, Sänger, Model

items.text:
Wenn ein Schauspieler auch mit Musik berührt, bleibt ein Abend ganz anders im Herzen 

Sandra und ich, Christian, haben Florian Thunemann in der Wundertüte in Köln-Sülz live auf der Bühne erlebt, an seiner Gitarre als Begleitung einer Band, und dieser Abend war für uns weit mehr als nur ein schöner Barbesuch. 

Viele kennen Florian Thunemann aus seiner "filmischen Erfahrung" in „SOKO Leipzig“ im ZDF, „Wege zum Glück - Spuren im Sand“ im ZDF sowie „Alles was zählt“ bei RTL und auf RTL+. Umso besonderer war es für uns, ihn an diesem Abend nicht nur als starken Schauspieler wahrzunehmen, sondern auch als Musiker, der mit Gefühl, Ruhe und echter Hingabe spielt. 

Sein Gitarrenspiel hatte Wärme, Tiefe und eine ganz eigene Sprache. Es war nicht nur musikalische Begleitung, sondern ein Ausdruck von Persönlichkeit, Präsenz und künstlerischer Reife. Genau diese Verbindung aus Schauspielkunst und Musik hat uns berührt und diesen Abend für uns so erinnerungswürdig gemacht. 

Auch die Wundertüte selbst hat dazu wunderbar gepasst. Ein Ort mit Charakter, ehrlicher Atmosphäre und einem echten Herz für Kultur. Genau solche Bars sind es, die Live-Momente nicht nur möglich machen, sondern ihnen Seele geben. 

Lieber Florian Thunemann, danke für diesen besonderen Abend. Und auch an die Wundertüte ein herzliches Danke für einen Ort, an dem Kunst, Musik und Begegnung so schön zusammenfinden. 

Kennst Du Florian Thunemann bislang eher aus dem Fernsehen, oder würdest Du ihn auch gern einmal live mit seiner Musik erleben? 

Lass es mich gern im Kommentarfeld wissen ;-) 

Christian Weiße / Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion - Zuschauer, Auftraggeber, Partner / Karrideo Imagefilm-Produktion  

#FlorianThunemann #WundertüteKöln #AllesWasZählt #LiveMusik #KölnSülz
